patch.value:
## Context

File: src/cli/commands/health.ts lines 1095-1103 — max_schema_version is stored in the probe result. Lines 1163-1187 build the warnings array but contain no branch comparing max_schema_version against the client constant.

File: src/core/telemetry/runtime.ts line 25 — TELEMETRY_SCHEMA_VERSION = 1 (client constant).

The gap: when a future ingest server advertises schema_version=2, the health check stays ok:true/warn-free. An operator would need to manually inspect the JSON to notice the drift.

## Acceptance criteria

- When checkTelemetry is true AND endpoint probe succeeds AND max_schema_version parses to a valid integer > TELEMETRY_SCHEMA_VERSION, emit warning `telemetry_schema_version_behind:<server_version>`.
- Add `telemetry_schema_version_behind` to the remediation registry (code → summary: 'Client schema is behind server; upgrade pm-cli to emit the latest event shape.').
- Tests: one case where versions match (no warning), one where server > client (warning emitted), one where header is absent (no warning).

## Evidence

src/cli/commands/health.ts:1095 — max_schema_version read but never compared.
src/core/telemetry/runtime.ts:25 — TELEMETRY_SCHEMA_VERSION constant available for comparison.
Warn in pm health when server-advertised max telemetry schema version exceeds client version

The endpoint probe in pm health --check-telemetry reads the x-pm-telemetry-max-schema-version / x-pm-telemetry-max-version response headers and surfaces them in details.endpoint_probe.max_schema_version, but emits no warning when the server supports a higher schema version than the client (TELEMETRY_SCHEMA_VERSION=1). Without this signal, agents and operators have no way to discover that the client is behind the ingest contract.
Warning emitted when server schema > client schema; remediation entry registered; 3 new unit tests pass at 100% coverage.

- When checkTelemetry is true AND endpoint probe succeeds AND max_schema_version parses to a valid integer > TELEMETRY_SCHEMA_VERSION, emit warning `telemetry_schema_version_behind:<server_version>`.
- Add `telemetry_schema_version_behind` to the remediation registry (code → summary: 'Client schema is behind server; upgrade pm-cli to emit the latest event shape.').
- Tests: one case where versions match (no warning), one where server > client (warning emitted), one where header is absent (no warning).

value.author: codex-active-pm-cycle-20260607
value.text: Implemented telemetry schema drift warning in health telemetry check: src/cli/commands/health.ts emits telemetry_schema_version_behind:<server_version> when endpoint probe is ok and advertised schema exceeds TELEMETRY_SCHEMA_VERSION. Exported TELEMETRY_SCHEMA_VERSION from src/core/telemetry/runtime.ts for shared comparison and added remediation mapping in src/core/diagnostics/remediation.ts. Added test matrix in tests/unit/health-command.spec.ts (match/behind/missing header) and remediation lookup coverage in tests/integration/remediation-registry.spec.ts. Verification: focused suite pass.

value.author: codex-active-pm-cycle-20260607
value.text: Full verification stack passed (build/typecheck/coverage/contracts/static/security/audit/compatibility/sentry). Linked tests pass via pm test --run for health telemetry schema warning matrix and remediation registry resolution.
